content.text: [{"ref_id":0,"title":"AI-Assisted Development Tools Reduce Bug Density by 23%","terms":"AI development tools","content":"A longitudinal study across 14 software teams (n=312 engineers) found that integrating AI code-completion and chat tools into the development workflow reduced post-release bug density by 23% over 18 months. Teams using AI assistants during code review caught an additional 18% of logic errors before merge. The strongest effect appeared in unfamiliar codebases: engineers new to a repository produced 31% fewer defects when AI context retrieval was available inline. The study controlled for team size, language, and prior test coverage. Effect sizes were largest for Python and TypeScript projects."}]

searchIndexArguments.search: What percentage reduction in bug density was found from AI-assisted development tools?

references.title: AI-Assisted Development Tools Reduce Bug Density by 23%
